description: 1. Classic t-shirt from puma's official ferrari Scuderia range 2. Blazing Ferrari logo on the front of the t-shirt 3. Comfortable Fit and trendy design Sport this all time favorite puma Ferrari T-shirt and you will make heads turn. All you Ferrari fans out there, get this T-shirt now!   Every T-shirt has a different identity. It's a medium of expressing your attitude & personality.It is comfortable, durable, easy to wear and maintain which makes it the best 'type' of casual clothing. It has a mass appeal and can be worn in anyway a person wants to. The best part is it just fits anyone of any size. Available in numerous colours and designs which makes it really tough to choose from. Wear it while travelling, playing, exercising, meeting friends, casual get-together's, absolutely anywhere, it won't make you feel out of the place, it is a form of clothing that needs no occasion to advertise itself. Team it up with almost anything and it looks just perfect. It suits everyone and anyone.Is there any other reason a person would want to have one of their own!   Model's Statistics:1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-5.11", Shoulders-17.5 "
